回應上個post 一定星:

其實mathematical theory 同其他 natural science or other theory 唔係同一個意思; 你所講嘅 <公理> 係近於後者, 而mathematical theory 係屬於 <真理> (truth) 一類. Mathematical theory 唔會被新的 theory 取代, 而係會被新的theory generalize.

Let m,n be two distinct numbers,
0 = 0
m x 0 = n x 0
m = n
which leads to contradiction.
By contradiction, m and n are the same.
Therefore, all numbers in this world are indeed the same.
